title: AIIMS Kalyani NMHS Survey Field Data Collector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) NMHS Survey Field Data Collector Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Kalyani. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Kalyani NMHS Survey Field Data Collector Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Psychology / Social work / Sociology/ rural development or related areas
qualification.details: Masters in Psychology / Social work / Sociology/ rural development or related areas

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Kalyani NMHS Survey Field Data Collector Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani NMHS Survey Field Data Collector recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the NMHS Survey Field Data Collector post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the NMHS Survey Field Data Collector position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master's degree in Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Rural Development, or related fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the NMHS Survey Field Data Collector post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Kalyani NMHS Survey Field Data Collector recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview and potentially a skill test.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Kalyani located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in Kalyani, West Bengal, with the pincode 741245.

faq.question: Q10. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 02nd June 2026.
